name: Chocolate Banana Snack Cake2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour an 8" x 8" x 2" square pan.
3. In a small mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla extract. Stir until smooth.
5. Add mashed ripe banana and beat until well combined.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and sprinkle chocolate chips on top.
7. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow cooling in the pan on a wire rack before cutting into squares.
